settings.heading: Detailed full-color apparel output for bold customer artwork.
settings.lead: The uploaded photos do not show a standalone DTF machine, but they do show detailed full-color shirt output and production proof that fits transfer-style apparel conversations.
settings.body:
DTF printing is useful when artwork has gradients, small details, multiple colors or a lower quantity than a traditional screen printing setup. The uploaded photos show full-color customer apparel with sponsor logos, illustrated designs and detailed graphics on dark and light garments.

Use DTF for detailed shirt designs, short runs, customer artwork, event graphics, sponsor-heavy layouts and apparel campaigns where color flexibility matters.
settings.features: Full-Color Artwork,Detailed Graphics,Short Runs,Sponsor Logos,Customer Apparel

settings.heading: Detailed apparel examples from uploaded photos.
settings.intro: These photos show full-color output and production proof; they are used for DTF marketing without claiming a DTF machine is pictured.
